body:
Calling form validation during OTP auto-submit could trigger `flushSync` from inside a lifecycle method. Field validation now updates the form registry synchronously as part of the normal validation pass, so submit blocking still sees current validity without forcing a React flush.

## Changes

- Remove the `flushSync` wrapper from field control validation.
- Update form validation callers to use the simplified validate contract.
- Keep matching registered field entries in sync when field validity changes.
- Add an OTP auto-submit regression with `Form`.
title: [form] Avoid flushSync during validation
